nodes.name: 三趾鹑科
nodes.summary: 三趾鹑科（Turnicidae）是图谱中的科级分类节点，当前关联12种鸟类，如Sumba buttonquail、Black-rumped buttonquail、Fynbos buttonquail等12种鸟类。

nodes.name: 松巴三趾鹑
nodes.summary: 松巴三趾鹑（Turnix everetti）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Sumba buttonquail。

nodes.name: 鸟纲
nodes.summary: 鸟纲（Aves）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: 鸻形目
nodes.summary: 鸻形目（Charadriiformes）是图谱中的目级分类节点，当前关联310种鸟类，如勺嘴鹬、短腿鸻、白鞘嘴鸥等310种鸟类。

nodes.name: 三趾鹑属
nodes.summary: 三趾鹑属（Turnix）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联15种鸟类，如Red-backed buttonquail、棕三趾鹑、Spotted buttonquail等15种鸟类。

nodes.name: Sumba buttonquail
nodes.summary: The Sumba buttonquail (Turnix everetti) is a species of bird in the family Turnicidae. The scientific name commemorates British colonial administrator and zoological collector Alfred Hart Everett. Distribution and habitat It is endemic to Sumba Island in the Lesser Sundas of Indonesia. Its natural habitats are dry savanna, subtropical or tropical moist shrubland, subtropical or tropical dry lowland grassland, and arable land. It is threatened by habitat loss. References External links BirdLife Species Factsheet.
